replics: Cassandra: Hello, boy. What brings you here?
Artem: I'm Artem, I fly around here in my strange machine. Tell me about yourself.
Cassandra: I run this place. But the problem is, since the flooding, I've been getting almost no results.
Artem: What do you think this is connected to?

Cassandra: I can't figure it out yet, but this is really troubling me: I had a falling out with Zakhar, my engineer, and rejected his project without properly explaining its shortcomings. Now I'm not even sure of my calculations, because I can't logically justify my refusal. If I can't trust my own logic, how am I supposed to run it, and what will people think?
